nasb.text: For Your righteousness, O God, reaches to the heavens, You who have done great things; O God, who is like You?

esv.text: Your righteousness, O God, reaches the high heavens. You who have done great things, O God, who is like you?

cnv.text: 神啊！你的公義達到高天， 你曾經行過大事， 　神啊！有誰像你呢？

ccb.text: 上帝啊，你的公义高达穹苍， 你成就了奇妙大事。 上帝啊，有谁能像你？

csbs.text: 神哪，你的公义上达高天； 你已经行了大事！ 神哪，谁能像你那样呢？
